payload.subject: 2020-2024 MTA Capital Program

payload.description: Total DBE Awards

payload.claim_text: NYCT and C&D have jointly reviewed in detail the experiences from London, Copenhagen and Paris. All the properties experienced several years of system stabilization period after first in-service and gain in momentum after a learning curve. We are aligned with the worldwide practices for CBTC implementations: DB with long term maintenance, Standard IP radio, No legacy underlay system, Equipment of the work train.
payload.subject: NYCT and MTA C&D CBTC approach
